Our Ministries

Preaching the Gospel

Sharing Christ's hope through village outreach, prayer, Scripture, and faithful Gospel witness.

Gospel Ministry

Carrying the
Good News

The heartbeat of this ministry is the message of Jesus Christ. Through preaching, prayer, and personal ministry, we carry eternal hope to people who need the light of the Gospel.

"Go into all the world and preach the gospel to every creature."

- Mark 16:15

Field Outreach

Hope shared one village at a time.

The Proclamation

The message we carry forward

01

Light in the Darkness

Sharing Christ's hope with every soul.

02

The Good News

Proclaiming salvation to all nations.

03

Truth Unleashed

Reaching the lost with the Living Word.

04

Eternal Hope

Bringing the message of Jesus to the world.

Purpose

To make Jesus known.

Approach

Prayer & Word.

Outreach Continuity

Preaching is the start,
care continues after.

01

Village gatherings where the message of Jesus is preached with clarity.

02

Prayer for families, seekers, and believers who need hope and strength.

03

Scripture teaching that helps people understand salvation and discipleship.

04

Connection with local pastors so the care continues after the meeting.

Every outreach begins so that people may encounter Jesus.

Contact Ministry
✦ Sunday Worship: 10:30 AM & 07:30 PM✦ Fasting Prayer: Every Friday 07:30 PM✦ Youth Meeting: Sunday 02:00 PM✦ Sunday School: Every Sunday during Worship Service✦ All Night Prayers: Last Friday 09:00 PM onwards✦ Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh✦ Sunday Worship: 10:30 AM & 07:30 PM✦ Fasting Prayer: Every Friday 07:30 PM✦ Youth Meeting: Sunday 02:00 PM✦ Sunday School: Every Sunday during Worship Service✦ All Night Prayers: Last Friday 09:00 PM onwards✦ Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh
Savior's Heartbeat
Ministries · Est. 1976

Preaching and Preparing People for HIS Coming. Serving communities across India with the transforming love of Jesus Christ since 1976.

“God Holy Spirit may touch you and speak to your heart to fulfill the Savior's Heartbeat.”

📞304 620 1974☎+91 7399577999✉saviorsheartbeatin@gmail.com
📍Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India
